owner_request: Add rss_tag_rules + rss_item_tags + auto_tag_rss_items using taxonomy_tags.tag_code as the canonical RSS tagging source, wire ingest-rss to auto-tag newly upserted items, and capture the operating specs in repo docs.

migration-validator.evidence: Applied 20260313000043 through a temporary admin-only helper, then repaired remote migration history with `supabase migration repair 20260313000043 --status applied --linked`.

rls-auditor.evidence: public.rss_tag_rules and public.rss_item_tags are live with RLS enabled plus authenticated/service_role/admin policies from 20260313000043.

feed-pipeline-checker.evidence: Live path verified: `ingest-rss` v22 calls `auto_tag_rss_items`, `rss_item_tags` now contains 603 rows across 19 distinct tag_codes, and `rss-to-signals` consumes those tags on promotion.

schema-db-suite.evidence: Remote DB now records 20260313000043, `rss_tag_rules` holds 66 active seeded rules, and `rss_item_tags` query returns 603 live rows.

build-gate.evidence: `deno check --node-modules-dir=auto supabase/functions/ingest-rss/index.ts`, `deno check --node-modules-dir=auto supabase/functions/rss-to-signals/index.ts`, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and `npm run build` all exited 0.

live_db_actions: Applied migration 20260313000043 to create public.rss_tag_rules, public.rss_item_tags, normalize_tag_match_text(text), and auto_tag_rss_items(uuid, integer, text).
Repaired remote migration history so 20260313000043 is recorded on project rumdmulxzmjtsplsjngi.
Verified 66 active rule rows in public.rss_tag_rules.
Forced live redeploy of ingest-rss to v22 after the first deploy did not advance the remote bundle hash.
Invoked ingest-rss with batch_size=1 and confirmed `total_tag_rows_written = 30` on the live response.
commands_run: POST /functions/v1/apply-intel-monetization {"action":"query","sql":"select count(*) from public.rss_tag_rules where is_active = true"}
notes: A temporary admin-only helper function was used because the linked project still has broad historical migration drift and a blind `supabase db push` was unsafe. The helper and its one-time secret were deleted after verification.
overall remains WARN because this artifact is first-party build evidence awaiting reviewer sign-off, not a self-issued DONE state.
